description: District Line: Service is operating at a reduced frequency on the entire line due to strike action.
Jubilee Line: Service is operating at a reduced frequency on the entire line due to strike action.
Metropolitan Line: Service is operating at a reduced frequency between Baker Street and Uxbridge / Amersham / Chesham / Watford. No service on the rest of the line due to strike action.

Central Line: Service is operating at a reduced frequency between Liverpool Street and Epping / Hainault via Newbury Park, between Hainault and Woodford, between White City and West Ruislip and between White City and Ealing Broadway. No service on the rest of the line due to strike action
